name: d3-delaunay

en.when_to_use: Use it when a set of 2D points needs Voronoi cells, a Delaunay triangulation, a convex hull, or nearest-neighbor queries instead of calculating cell boundaries by hand; use a plot/chart for an ordinary scatterplot. Augmentation boundary: it computes geometry and can optionally produce an SVG path with render() or draw into a canvas ctx; the consuming AI chooses the rendering carrier.
en.why_valuable: AI is almost certain to get hand-calculated Voronoi cell boundaries, infinite-cell clipping, and triangle adjacency wrong; d3-delaunay uses an incremental algorithm (delaunator) to fix the topology, directly supporting computational geometry, nearest neighbors, spatial partitioning, and generative art from only a point array.

data_in.note: points is parsed as [[x,y],...] or a flat [x0,y0,x1,y1,...] array by default; object arrays require fx/fy accessors. voronoi bounds affect only cell clipping and the render viewport.

schema.points: [x,y][] | number[] | object[] -- 2D points; use with fx/fy accessors for an object array
schema.fx?: (d)=>number -- get X from an object (for object point sets)
schema.fy?: (d)=>number -- get Y from an object (for object point sets)

when_to_use: 给一组 2D 点要 Voronoi 单元/Delaunay 三角网/凸包/最近邻查询时用它,而非手算单元边界;画普通散点用 plot/chart。augment 边界:只算几何 + 可选 render() 产 SVG path 或画进 canvas ctx,渲染载体由消费 AI 定。
why_valuable: AI 手算 Voronoi 单元边界、无穷单元裁剪、三角邻接几乎必错;d3-delaunay 用增量算法(delaunator)固定拓扑,输出直接教计算几何/最近邻/空间划分/生成艺术,输入只需点数组。

data_in.note: points 默认按 [[x,y],...] 或扁平 [x0,y0,x1,y1,...] 解析;对象数组需传 fx/fy 存取器。voronoi 的 bounds 只影响单元裁剪与 render 视口。

schema.points: [x,y][] | number[] | object[] —— 二维点;对象数组时配合 fx/fy 存取器
schema.fx?: (d)=>number —— 从对象取 X(对象点集时)
schema.fy?: (d)=>number —— 从对象取 Y(对象点集时)

provides._note: headless-primitive:三角化/Voronoi 几何,render() 可产 SVG path 或画进 canvas ctx;无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵,渲染载体由消费 AI 选。
provides.outputs: Delaunay 三角网 + Voronoi 单元多边形/凸包/邻接/最近邻查询。render([ctx]) 无 ctx 时返回 SVG path 字符串,传 2d context 则画进 canvas。

api_surface.render: delaunay.render([ctx])/renderPoints([ctx],r)/renderHull([ctx]); voronoi.render([ctx])/renderCell(i,[ctx])/renderBounds([ctx]) —— 无 ctx 返回 SVG path 字符串

boot.note: Delaunay.from 吃 [[x,y],...]/扁平数组/对象数组(配 fx/fy);render() 无 context 时返回 SVG path 字符串,传 2d context 则画进 canvas。库无 DOM/style/event/window 足迹。

isolation.evidence: +esm named exports Delaunay, Voronoi(F/X)已核。Delaunay.from(points[, fx, fy])——points 为 [[x,y],...]/扁平 Float64Array/对象+存取器(src/delaunay.js:35);delaunay.voronoi([xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax]) 默认 [0,0,960,500](src/voronoi.js:5)。render:delaunay.render([ctx])/voronoi.render([ctx])/renderPoints/renderHull/renderCell 在不传 context 时 RETURN SVG path 字符串(src/delaunay.js:162 `context==null ? context=new Path`),传 2d context 则画进该 context。几何:voronoi.cellPolygon(i)、delaunay.trianglePolygons()、delaunay.hullPolygon()、delaunay.find(x,y)、delaunay.neighbors(i)。dep:delaunator@5。零 DOM/style/event/window 足迹(只写入调用方提供的 canvas context)。headless-primitive。
